metadata.name: Apply a Corporate Rate to a Booking

description: An employee of a partner company is booking a room and wants to use their corporate discount.

nodes.task_description: Ask the customer for their corporate discount code or company name.
Validate the corporate code and retrieve the associated discounted rate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the code is valid and finds the 15% discount rate.

nodes.task_description: Create a new reservation with the corporate rate applied.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully books the room at the discounted price.
